name: C# Gameplay Script v1
decision_reason: StarterArena has one C# script with real SagaScript compile evidence, SagaRuntime smoke consumes emitted script binding and artifact metadata, and the dev-shell runtime smoke invokes exactly one known pure method, AddPickupScore(10, 5), with result 15. Arbitrary script invocation, C# lifecycle execution, Visual Blocks, editor workflow, server authority, package output, distribution output, and maintainer verification remain absent.
